word: H7431 - רֶמֶשׂ - remes - reh'-mes - That creepeth

sections.paragraph:
Original: רמשׂ

Transliteration: remeś

Phonetic: reh'-mes

BDB Definition:

  1. creeping things, moving things, creeping organism
    1. creeping things
    2. gliding things (of sea animals)
    3. moving things (of all animals)

Origin: from H7430

TWOT entry: 2177a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
